Defendant Hps1 Block 55, Llc, A Delaware Limited Liability Company?S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. CRUZ ROCHA, Esq. of Murphy Austin Adams Schoenfeld LLP (Tel: 916-446-2300) appearing via CourtCall for Plaintiff Valdez Painting;
Atty. LISA G. SCHLITTNER, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (Tel: 415-986-5900) appearing via CourtCall for Defendant HPS1 Block 55, LLC.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT HPS1 BLOCK 55, LLC'S Motion To Stay Action Pending Arbitration.

The Court and counsel discuss plaintiff's modification to its non-opposition. Plaintiff does not oppose the stay but requests leave to amend the Complaint before the case is stayed. Defendant does not object to plaintiff amending the Complaint on the condition that defendant need not re-file its motion to stay and will be permitted to file its responsive pleading prior to the case being stayed.

The Court instructs counsel to prepare and submit a stipulation and proposed order outlining that the stay will not go into effect until plaintiff has filed its amended Complaint and defendant has filed its responsive pleading. The document may be emailed to the Court at contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2020 Set For Trial On Nov-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
